title: Bodhi's Big Feelings at Bedtime
synopsis: When bedtime feels scary, little Bodhi learns that sharing his big feelings with Mama helps him feel brave and ready for sweet dreams.

pages.text: Bodhi was a happy little boy who loved to play all day long. He built tall towers with his blocks and zoomed toy cars around the living room. But when the sun went down and Mama said 'Bedtime!', Bodhi's happy feelings changed to something else. His tummy felt funny and his heart beat faster.

illustration.description: A young Black boy with curly hair playing happily with colorful blocks and toy cars in a bright living room. The room has warm yellow walls and a soft blue rug. Sunlight streams through the window, creating a cheerful, energetic mood. The boy has a big smile and sparkling eyes.
illustration.alt: Bodhi playing happily with toys in the living room during daytime

pages.text: 'I don't want to go to bed!' Bodhi said, feeling scared. The hallway to his bedroom looked long and dark. What if there were monsters hiding in the shadows? What if he had bad dreams? Bodhi felt very small and worried. His bottom lip started to wobble, and tears filled his eyes.

illustration.description: Bodhi standing at the entrance to a dimly lit hallway, looking worried and small. His expression shows fear with wide eyes and a trembling lip. The hallway has soft purple shadows, but his mother's silhouette is visible in the background. The lighting contrasts warm living room colors with cooler nighttime blues.
illustration.alt: Bodhi looking scared at the dark hallway leading to his bedroom

pages.text: Mama knelt down next to Bodhi and gave him a gentle hug. 'I can see you're feeling scared,' she said softly. 'It's okay to have big feelings. Let's talk about what's making you worried.' Bodhi sniffled and told Mama about the dark hallway and the maybe-monsters. Mama listened to every word and nodded with understanding.

illustration.description: A warm scene showing Bodhi's mother, a woman with long braided hair and kind brown eyes, kneeling down to hug Bodhi. Both characters have caring, gentle expressions. The setting is warm and cozy with soft golden lighting. Mama wears a comfortable sweater in calming green colors.
illustration.alt: Mama hugging Bodhi and listening to his worries with a caring expression

pages.text: 'You know what?' Mama said with a smile. 'I have an idea to help you feel brave.' She took Bodhi's hand and they walked down the hallway together, turning on the little nightlight as they went. The warm, gentle glow made everything look friendly and safe. 'See? No monsters here, just your cozy bedroom waiting for you.'

illustration.description: Mama and Bodhi walking hand-in-hand down the hallway, now softly lit by a glowing nightlight. The nightlight casts a warm, star-shaped glow on the textured walls. Both characters look more relaxed and confident. The hallway appears welcoming with soft yellow and orange tones.
illustration.alt: Mama and Bodhi walking together down the now-lit hallway toward his bedroom

pages.text: In his bedroom, Mama helped Bodhi put on his favorite pajamas with little rockets on them. They read a story about a brave astronaut who wasn't afraid of the dark because he had his spaceship to keep him safe. 'Your bed is like a cozy spaceship,' Mama said. 'And I'm always right next door if you need me.' Bodhi started to feel braver.

illustration.description: Bodhi in rocket-patterned pajamas sitting on his bed with Mama, looking at a colorful picture book. The bedroom is cozy with a rocket-themed nightlight, stuffed animals, and soft bedding in blues and greens. Both characters look calm and content, sharing a peaceful bedtime story moment.
illustration.alt: Bodhi and Mama reading a bedtime story together in his cozy bedroom

pages.text: As Mama tucked him in, Bodhi felt safe and loved. His scared feelings had melted away, replaced by brave, sleepy feelings. 'Thank you for helping me with my big feelings, Mama,' he whispered. 'Sweet dreams, my brave boy,' Mama whispered back, giving him one last kiss. Bodhi closed his eyes, feeling happy and ready for wonderful dreams about flying rockets among the stars.

illustration.description: A peaceful nighttime scene with Bodhi snuggled under his covers, looking content and sleepy. Mama is giving him a gentle goodnight kiss. The room is softly lit by the nightlight, creating a serene atmosphere with deep blues and gentle yellows. Bodhi's expression shows peace and happiness.
illustration.alt: Mama giving Bodhi a goodnight kiss as he lies peacefully in his cozy bed

metadata.illustrationStyle: Bright, cheerful cartoon style with expressive faces. Bold primary colors. Rounded, friendly shapes. Slightly textured backgrounds like construction paper.

questions.question: How did Bodhi feel when Mama said it was bedtime?
questions.explanation: Bodhi felt scared when bedtime came because the hallway looked dark and he worried about monsters.

questions.question: What did Mama do when Bodhi told her his worries?
choices: She listened and gave him a hug
questions.explanation: Mama listened to Bodhi's worries and gave him a gentle hug to help him feel better.

questions.question: What helped make the hallway feel less scary?
questions.explanation: The nightlight made the hallway bright and friendly, so it didn't seem scary anymore.

questions.question: How did Bodhi feel at the end of the story?
questions.explanation: By the end, Bodhi felt happy and brave because Mama helped him work through his scared feelings.

pages.title: Fill in the Missing Words
pages.text: Bodhi was feeling _____ about bedtime, but Mama helped him feel _____ by turning on the _____ and reading a story together.

pages.title: Complete the Story
pages.text: When Bodhi had big _____, Mama gave him a _____ and they walked down the _____ together to his cozy bedroom.
